title: Termination, Budgets, Timeouts, and Progress Detection
description: Stop an agent safely under success, failure, budget, and no-progress conditions. Learners cumulatively produce a loop termination and budget policy through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Terminate only when completion evidence satisfies the goal contract.
Classify retryable, recoverable, authority-blocked, and terminal failures.
Budget turns, tokens, time, tool calls, money, and external side effects.
